text.content: 1) AI 영상 생성용 (Runway·Kling·Pika 등) 복붙 템플릿

rich_text.plain_text: 1) AI 영상 생성용 (Runway·Kling·Pika 등) 복붙 템플릿

text.content: 템플릿 A: 한 문장(짧게, 샷 중심)

rich_text.plain_text: 템플릿 A: 한 문장(짧게, 샷 중심)

text.content:
\[SUBJECT\], \[ACTION\], \[ENVIRONMENT\]. \[CAMERA\]. \[LIGHTING\]. \[STYLE\]. \[QUALITY\].

Subject: \[예: a small retro robot\]
Action: \[예: turns its head left then right\]
Environment: \[예: in a clean sci-fi lab\]
Camera: \[예: slow dolly in, medium shot, shallow depth of field\]
Lighting: \[예: soft key light, rim light, volumetric fog\]
Style: \[예: cinematic, realistic materials\]
Quality: \[예: 24fps, smooth motion, no jitter\]

text.content: 템플릿 B: 애니메이션 키워드(움직임 품질 고정)

rich_text.plain_text: 템플릿 B: 애니메이션 키워드(움직임 품질 고정)

text.content:
Motion: smooth, ease-in ease-out, slight anticipation, subtle secondary motion, clean arcs
Camera: stable, slow movement, no random shake
Avoid: jitter, warping, broken anatomy, flicker, frame blending artifacts

rich_text.plain_text:
Motion: smooth, ease-in ease-out, slight anticipation, subtle secondary motion, clean arcs

text.content: 템플릿 C: 로봇 동작 예시(3~5초 과제용)

rich_text.plain_text: 템플릿 C: 로봇 동작 예시(3~5초 과제용)

text.content:
A cute robot on a desk. The robot looks left, pauses, then looks right, and waves once.
Medium shot, slow dolly in, shallow depth of field.
Soft studio lighting with rim light.
Smooth motion with ease-in and ease-out, small anticipation before the wave.
24fps, 4 seconds.

text.content:
\[Realistic\] cinematic, physically based materials, filmic contrast, subtle grain
\[Stylized\] 3D animation, clean shapes, vibrant colors, soft shadows
\[Anime\] anime style, cel shading, clean linework, simple backgrounds
\[Miniature\] tilt-shift miniature look, shallow depth of field, soft lighting

rich_text.plain_text:

\[Stylized\] 3D animation, clean shapes, vibrant colors, soft shadows
\[Anime\] anime style, cel shading, clean linework, simple backgrounds
\[Miniature\] tilt-shift miniature look, shallow depth of field, soft lighting

text.content: 2) Blender MCP(Claude)로 씬 생성·애니메이션 요청 템플릿

rich_text.plain_text: 2) Blender MCP(Claude)로 씬 생성·애니메이션 요청 템플릿

text.content:
In Blender, create a new scene for a 5-second animation at 24fps.
Set frame range to 1-120.
Use EEVEE.
Add a ground plane and a simple three-point lighting setup.
Create a camera at \[CAMERA_LOCATION\] looking at \[TARGET\].

rich_text.plain_text:
In Blender, create a new scene for a 5-second animation at 24fps.
Set frame range to 1-120.
Use EEVEE.
Add a ground plane and a simple three-point lighting setup.
Create a camera at \[CAMERA_LOCATION\] looking at \[TARGET\].

text.content:
Create a \[MESH_TYPE\] and name it "\[OBJECT_NAME\]".
Place it at location \[X, Y, Z\].
Set rotation (Euler) to \[X, Y, Z\] degrees.
Set scale to \[X, Y, Z\].
Apply a \[MATERIAL_DESCRIPTION\].

rich_text.plain_text:
Create a \[MESH_TYPE\] and name it "\[OBJECT_NAME\]".
Place it at location \[X, Y, Z\].
Set rotation (Euler) to \[X, Y, Z\] degrees.
Set scale to \[X, Y, Z\].
Apply a \[MATERIAL_DESCRIPTION\].

text.content:
Animate the object named "\[OBJECT_NAME\]" using Location keyframes only.
Frame 1: location \[X1, Y1, Z1\]
Frame \[F2\]: location \[X2, Y2, Z2\]
Use Bezier interpolation with ease-in/ease-out.

rich_text.plain_text:
Animate the object named "\[OBJECT_NAME\]" using Location keyframes only.
Frame 1: location \[X1, Y1, Z1\]
Frame \[F2\]: location \[X2, Y2, Z2\]
Use Bezier interpolation with ease-in/ease-out.

text.content:
Animate the object named "\[OBJECT_NAME\]" using Rotation Z keyframes.
Frame 1: 0 degrees
Frame 24: +45 degrees
Frame 48: 0 degrees
Frame 72: -45 degrees
Frame 96: 0 degrees
Make the motion smooth (Bezier) and avoid overshoot.

rich_text.plain_text:
Animate the object named "\[OBJECT_NAME\]" using Rotation Z keyframes.
Frame 1: 0 degrees
Frame 24: +45 degrees
Frame 48: 0 degrees
Frame 72: -45 degrees
Frame 96: 0 degrees
Make the motion smooth (Bezier) and avoid overshoot.

text.content:
Add a hold by duplicating the keyframe at frame \[HOLD_START\] and placing it at frame \[HOLD_END\].
Offset the arm animation by +6 frames relative to the head animation.

rich_text.plain_text:
Add a hold by duplicating the keyframe at frame \[HOLD_START\] and placing it at frame \[HOLD_END\].
Offset the arm animation by +6 frames relative to the head animation.

text.content:
Animate the camera.
Frame 1: location \[X1, Y1, Z1\], rotation \[RX1, RY1, RZ1\]
Frame 120: location \[X2, Y2, Z2\], rotation \[RX2, RY2, RZ2\]
Use smooth Bezier interpolation.
Keep the camera stable (no handheld shake).

rich_text.plain_text:
Animate the camera.
Frame 1: location \[X1, Y1, Z1\], rotation \[RX1, RY1, RZ1\]
Frame 120: location \[X2, Y2, Z2\], rotation \[RX2, RY2, RZ2\]
Use smooth Bezier interpolation.
Keep the camera stable (no handheld shake).

text.content:
Set output to FFmpeg Video (H.264 MP4), 1280x720, 24fps.
Render the animation to \[OUTPUT_PATH\].

rich_text.plain_text:
Set output to FFmpeg Video (H.264 MP4), 1280x720, 24fps.
Render the animation to \[OUTPUT_PATH\].

text.content: 세트 A: 로봇 책상 위 4초 시네마틱(영상 생성용)

rich_text.plain_text: 세트 A: 로봇 책상 위 4초 시네마틱(영상 생성용)

text.content:
A small retro robot on a desk. The robot turns its head left, pauses, turns right, then waves once.
Medium shot, slow dolly in, shallow depth of field, rack focus from the robot's eyes to the hand.
Soft key light, subtle rim light, mild volumetric haze.
Smooth motion, ease-in and ease-out, slight anticipation before the wave, small secondary motion.
24fps, 4 seconds, cinematic realistic 3D.
Avoid jitter, flicker, warping.

rich_text.plain_text:
A small retro robot on a desk. The robot turns its head left, pauses, turns right, then waves once.
Medium shot, slow dolly in, shallow depth of field, rack focus from the robot's eyes to the hand.
Soft key light, subtle rim light, mild volumetric haze.
Smooth motion, ease-in and ease-out, slight anticipation before the wave, small secondary motion.
24fps, 4 seconds, cinematic realistic 3D.
Avoid jitter, flicker, warping.

text.content: 세트 B: 동일 동작을 Blender MCP로 만들기(애니메이션만)

rich_text.plain_text: 세트 B: 동일 동작을 Blender MCP로 만들기(애니메이션만)

text.content:
In Blender, set frame rate to 24fps and frame range to 1-120.

Animate the object named "Head" using Rotation Z keyframes:
Frame 1: 0 degrees
Frame 24: +45 degrees
Frame 48: 0 degrees
Frame 72: -45 degrees
Frame 96: 0 degrees

Animate the object named "Arm" using Rotation X keyframes, offset by +6 frames:
Frame 7: 0 degrees
Frame 18: +10 degrees (anticipation)
Frame 42: -90 degrees
Frame 54: -90 degrees (hold)
Frame 78: 0 degrees

Use Bezier interpolation for all keys.

rich_text.plain_text:
In Blender, set frame rate to 24fps and frame range to 1-120.

Animate the object named "Head" using Rotation Z keyframes:
Frame 1: 0 degrees
Frame 24: +45 degrees
Frame 48: 0 degrees
Frame 72: -45 degrees
Frame 96: 0 degrees

Animate the object named "Arm" using Rotation X keyframes, offset by +6 frames:
Frame 7: 0 degrees
Frame 18: +10 degrees (anticipation)
Frame 42: -90 degrees
Frame 54: -90 degrees (hold)
Frame 78: 0 degrees

Use Bezier interpolation for all keys.
